description: Use this API to convert a PSEB command file into a PSSE response file. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr, respfil = pseb(inpfile, outfile)

parameters.name: inpfile
parameters.description: Name of the pseb command file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: Name of response file; blank to have pseb assign the filename. (input; blank by default).

return_values.name: respfil
return_values.description: Pathname of the response file constructed by pseb. (output).

error_codes.description: errors detected while reading the PSEB Command Data input file.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
